title: Sephora Australia Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in an ASIC media release as the entity trading under the Sephora brand, paying an infringement notice for allegedly failing to lodge an audited financial report by the statutory deadline — a corporate financial-transparency compliance matter.
scope: Received an ASIC infringement notice ($198,000) for alleged late lodgement of an audited financial report, per 26-111MR
